timetracker-dash-newcustomer-label: {{Dashboard}} tile label linking to the new-customer form.
timetracker-dash-newjob-label: {{Dashboard}} tile label linking to the new-job form.
timetracker-dash-newtask-label: {{Dashboard}} tile label linking to the new-task form.
timetracker-dash-edittime-sub: {{Dashboard}} tile sub-label under the edit-time tile.
timetracker-dash-browse-label: {{Dashboard}} tile label linking to the Customers list (browse customers & jobs).
timetracker-sidebar-heading: Heading for the Time Tracker sidebar section (links mirroring the Main Page tiles).
timetracker-dash-browse-sub: {{Dashboard}} tile sub-label under the Browse tile.
timetracker-dash-reports-sub: {{Dashboard}} tile sub-label under the time-reports tile.
timetracker-label-customer: Field label for the customer a time entry belongs to.
timetracker-label-job: Field label for the job a time entry belongs to.
timetracker-label-user: Field label for the user a time entry belongs to (read-only for non-admins; a dropdown for time-tracker admins).
timetracker-notyourtime: Permission error when a non-owner, non-admin tries to edit someone's time page. $1 is the owning user's name.
timetracker-delete-has-jobs: Delete-blocked error shown when deleting a customer that still has jobs.
timetracker-delete-has-tasks: Delete-blocked error shown when deleting a job that still has tasks.
timetracker-delete-check-failed: Error shown when the delete-protection check could not query SMW (fails closed): the deletion is blocked until it can be confirmed.
timetracker-delete-has-time: Delete-blocked error shown when deleting a customer, job, or task that still has time logged against it (any user). No parameters.
timetracker-label-task: Field label for the task a time entry belongs to.
timetracker-task-general: The task-selector option meaning no specific task (the job's general/job-level bucket).
timetracker-label-note: Field label for an optional free-text note on the work.
timetracker-start: Label of the button that starts a timer.
timetracker-stop: Label of the button that stops the running timer.
timetracker-description-placeholder: Placeholder text in the note input.
timetracker-no-jobs: Message shown when no jobs exist yet.
timetracker-none-jobs: Empty-state for a customer's Jobs table.
timetracker-none-tasks: Empty-state for a job's Tasks table.
timetracker-timetable-capped: Footnote under an entity page’s time-entry table when it is capped. $1 is the row limit (number); $2 is a link to Special:TimeReports.
timetracker-status-active: Label on the status badge for an active job.
timetracker-status-archived: Label on the status badge for an archived job.
timetracker-new-job: Link label to the form that creates a new job.
timetracker-link-reports: Link label to the Time reports page.
timetracker-timer-elapsed: Live elapsed-time readout on a running timer. $1 is the elapsed time formatted as H:MM:SS.
timetracker-timer-elsewhere: Note on a job/task page when the viewer's single timer is running on something else. $1 is a linked "Customer : Job : Task" breadcrumb (the task segment is omitted for a job-level timer).
timetracker-saved-added: Confirmation banner after time is saved. $1 is the duration added, e.g. "2h 30m".
timetracker-summary-start: Edit summary used when a timer is started.
timetracker-summary-stop: Edit summary used when a timer is stopped.
timetracker-summary-add: Edit summary used when tracked time is accumulated into a day's entry.
timetracker-summary-edit: Edit summary used when a day's total is set via Special:EditTime.
timetracker-summary-remove: Edit summary used when a day's entry is removed (set to zero) via Special:EditTime.
addtime-label-day: Field label for the day whose time is being edited.
edittime-label-duration: Field label for the day's total duration (hours + minutes) being set.
addtime-hours: Short unit label after the hours input (hours).
addtime-minutes: Short unit label after the minutes input (minutes).
edittime-submit: Label of the save button on Special:EditTime.
edittime-cancel: Label of the cancel/back button on Special:EditTime; JS makes it go back in history.
edittime-entry-gone: Shown when a pencil-edit link targets a time entry whose customer or job has been deleted, so the form can't safely be pre-filled.
timereports-filter-customer: Filter-bar label for the customer selector.
timereports-filter-job: Filter-bar label for the job selector.
timereports-filter-user: Filter-bar label for the user selector.
timereports-filter-period: Filter-bar label for the time-period selector.
timereports-all-customers: Customer-selector option meaning no customer filter.
timereports-all-jobs: Job-selector option meaning no job filter.
timereports-filter-task: Filter-bar label for the task selector.
timereports-all-tasks: Task-selector option meaning no task filter.
timereports-range-week: Period option: a single Monday–Sunday week, pageable.
timereports-range-this_month: Period option: the current calendar month.
timereports-range-last_month: Period option: the previous calendar month.
timereports-range-this_year: Period option: the current calendar year.
timereports-range-last_year: Period option: the previous calendar year.
timereports-range-custom: Period option: a custom from/to date range.
timereports-view-list: Toggle-button label for the day-grouped list view of the report.
timereports-view-grid: Toggle-button label for the weekly grid view (tasks × weekdays matrix).
timereports-apply: Label of the button that applies the filters.
timereports-export-csv: Label of the link/button that downloads the filtered timesheet as a CSV file.
timereports-edit-entry: Tooltip on the per-row pencil link that opens Special:EditTime for that entry.
timereports-col-customer: Timesheet column header for the customer.
timereports-col-job: Timesheet column header for the job.
timereports-col-task: Timesheet column header for the task.
timereports-col-user: Timesheet column header for the user who logged the time.
timereports-col-notes: Timesheet column header for the work notes.
timereports-col-duration: Timesheet column header for the duration.
timereports-total: Row label for the grand-total duration at the foot of the timesheet.
timereports-none: Shown in place of the table when no entries match the filters.
